name: Ray Spear
description: Lightweight VZ car that is easy to build, easy to tune and a strong first choice for Box Stock or a future B-MAX build.

name: Neo-VQS
description: Popular VZ platform with a low body and wide parts compatibility. A practical beginner car with a clear upgrade path.

name: Cross Spear 01
description: Modern VZ kit for racers who want a newer body while keeping the same beginner-friendly upgrade ecosystem.

name: Mach Frame
description: Front-motor FM-A car with predictable braking and strong stability. One of the easiest chassis to explain to new racers.

name: K4 Gambol
description: Fun FM-A kit with a distinctive body. Suitable for beginners who prefer style without losing B-MAX upgrade compatibility.

name: Gun Bluster XTO Premium
description: Premium front-motor kit for fans of classic Fully Cowled designs. Keep as preorder or limited stock.

name: Aero Avante
description: Reliable AR chassis with wide parts compatibility and simple maintenance. A strong shop demonstration and workshop car.

name: Flame Astute
description: AR chassis car with a low racing body. Good for Box Stock and an easy platform for learning brakes, rollers and dampers.

name: Shadow Shark
description: Stable AR platform with a Formula-style body. Recommended for customers who want a classic racing appearance.

name: Beak Stinger G
description: Fully Cowled AR kit with broad upgrade compatibility. Good for customers who prefer anime-era body designs.

name: Diospada Premium
description: Premium AR kit aimed at collectors and experienced beginners. Keep as limited stock or preorder.

name: DCR-01
description: Balanced MA dual-shaft car with simple assembly and excellent stability. One of the best introductions to PRO motors.

name: Ignicion
description: Modern MA kit that combines easy assembly, balanced handling and a straightforward B-MAX upgrade route.

name: Raikiri
description: Popular MA kit with a low sports-car body. Good for customers who value appearance and stable handling.

name: Avante Mk.III Nero
description: Classic MS dual-shaft platform for racers who want to learn center-chassis tuning and PRO motor setups.

name: Ray Stinger Premium
description: Super-II option for classic Fully Cowled fans. Useful as a special-order chassis rather than a large stock item.

name: Mach Frame Philippine Cup Special
description: Philippine Cup edition of the popular FM-A Mach Frame. Keep this as a special-order collector kit rather than a required beginner purchase.

name: Geo Glider Asia Challenge 2026 Special
description: 2026 Asia Challenge special-edition FM-A kit. List only when supply is confirmed because availability is expected to be limited.

name: Exflowly Polycarbonate Body Special (Purple)
description: Purple polycarbonate-body MS special. Attractive for collectors and experienced builders, but not necessary for a first car.

name: Cyclone Magnum Memorial 25th Anniversary
description: Anniversary collector kit on the Super TZ-X chassis. Keep it separate from the recommended beginner chassis selection.

name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for VZ Chassis
description: The simplest first upgrade for a VZ car. Adds the essential plates, rollers and control parts in one compatible package.

name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for FM-A Chassis
description: A complete first-step FM-A package. Recommended before customers buy individual aluminum rollers or faster motors.

name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for MA Chassis
description: Beginner bundle for MA cars that adds stability parts without requiring customers to understand every component separately.

name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for AR Chassis
description: Straightforward AR upgrade set for learning front and rear plates, rollers and basic landing control.

name: Torque-Tuned 2 Motor
description: More acceleration and climbing power than the kit motor. Best first motor for short or technical layouts.

name: Rev-Tuned 2 Motor
description: Higher-rev motor for layouts with longer straights. Recommend only after the car is stable.

name: Atomic-Tuned 2 Motor
description: Balanced first motor upgrade for customers who do not yet know whether they need torque or maximum revs.

name: Light-Dash Motor
description: Intermediate motor between tuned motors and Hyper-Dash. Suitable after basic brakes and rollers are installed.

name: Hyper-Dash 3 Motor
description: Strong all-round race motor. Sell with a warning that the car should already have brakes, rollers and landing control.

name: Torque-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
description: Dual-shaft torque motor for MA, MS and ME cars. A safe first PRO motor upgrade.

name: Rev-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
description: Dual-shaft high-rev motor for MA, MS and ME cars. Best after basic stability parts are fitted.

name: Atomic-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
description: Balanced dual-shaft motor for new MA, MS and ME racers.

name: Light-Dash Motor PRO
description: Intermediate dual-shaft motor for racers moving beyond tuned motors.

name: Hyper-Dash Motor PRO
description: Competitive all-round dual-shaft motor. Recommend brakes and stable roller settings before use.

name: Brake Sponge Set Mild 1/2/3mm Blue
description: Mild brake material in three thicknesses. Easy for beginners to tune without slowing the car too aggressively.

name: Brake Sponge Set 1/2/3mm White
description: General-purpose brake material in three thicknesses for adjusting slope entry and jump speed.

name: Brake Set for AR Chassis
description: Simple bolt-on brake system for compatible chassis. Useful when customers want a complete brake assembly.

name: FRP Rear Brake Stay Set
description: Strong rear brake base that lets racers position sponge more accurately.

name: Front Under Guard
description: Helps the front of the car pass track joints and slopes more smoothly while protecting the chassis underside.

name: Mass Damper Set
description: Basic weights that reduce bouncing after jumps. One of the most useful stability upgrades for new racers.

name: Mass Damper Set Heavy
description: Heavier landing-control option for cars that still bounce or leave the track after jumps.

name: Slimline Mass Damper Set
description: Compact dampers that fit many B-MAX layouts without taking excessive space.

name: Side Mass Damper Set for AR Chassis
description: Complete side-damper package for compatible chassis. Easier than buying plates and weights separately.

name: Side Mass Damper Set for MA Chassis
description: MA-focused side-damper set that gives new racers a clear bolt-on landing-control solution.

name: Low-Friction Roller Set
description: Low-cost roller upgrade for smoother wall contact. Ideal before customers invest in aluminum rollers.

name: Low-Friction Plastic Double Rollers 13-12mm
description: Budget double rollers that improve wall contact and stability.

name: Low-Friction Plastic Double Rollers with Rubber Rings 13-12mm
description: Double rollers with rubber rings for additional control where the setup needs more wall grip.

name: Double Aluminum Rollers 13-12mm
description: Popular durable front roller option for competitive B-MAX setups.

name: 17mm Aluminum Rollers with Plastic Rings
description: 17mm aluminum rollers with plastic rings for smooth and durable wall contact.

name: HG 19mm Aluminum Ball-Race Rollers Ringless
description: Common 19mm rear roller choice for stable, low-friction B-MAX setups.

name: Long Stabilizing Pole and 13mm Roller Set
description: Simple stabilizer package that helps keep the car upright when it leans against the course wall.

name: Large-Diameter Stabilizer Head Set 11/15mm
description: Stabilizer heads for reducing rollovers and wall climbing.

name: Hi-Mount Tube Stabilizer Set Black
description: Compact high-mounted stabilizer option for more advanced B-MAX layouts.

name: FRP Multi Roller Setting Stay
description: Affordable universal FRP plate for adding and positioning rollers.

name: FRP Rear Multi Roller Setting Stay
description: Affordable rear FRP plate for rollers, dampers and brake assemblies.

name: FRP Wide Front Plate for AR Chassis
description: Wide front FRP plate that makes roller placement easier on compatible chassis.

name: FRP Wide Rear Plate for AR Chassis
description: Wide rear FRP plate for stable roller spacing and basic B-MAX layouts.

name: FRP Wide Front Plate for Fully Cowled Mini 4WD
description: Front plate designed for many Fully Cowled bodies where standard plates may interfere.

name: FRP Wide Front Plate for VZ Chassis
description: Modern wide front FRP plate with broad compatibility and clear roller mounting positions.

name: HG Carbon Wide Front Plate 1.5mm
description: Lighter and stiffer front plate for racers upgrading from FRP.

name: HG Carbon Wide Rear Plate 1.5mm
description: Lighter and stiffer rear plate for competitive setups.

name: Super Hard 26mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
description: Stable all-round wheel and tire set that reduces bounce and is easy to recommend to beginners.

name: Low-Friction 26mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
description: Lower-grip tire set for carrying more speed through corners once the car is already stable.

name: Low-Friction Narrow 24mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
description: Small-diameter narrow setup for lowering the car and tuning speed on technical tracks.

name: Low-Friction 31mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
description: Large-diameter option for advanced speed-focused builds. Keep as limited stock or special order.

name: Carbon-Reinforced 8T Pinion Gears 6pcs
description: Durable replacement pinions for routine maintenance and motor changes.

name: Carbon-Reinforced G13 and 8T Pinion Gear Set
description: Reinforced gear and pinion set for reducing wear in upgraded drivetrains.

name: Setting Gear Set for AR Chassis
description: Useful AR replacement and tuning gear set.

name: Setting Gear Set for FM-A Chassis
description: Useful FM-A replacement and tuning gear set.

name: PRO High-Speed EX Gear Set
description: High-speed gear option for MA, MS and ME cars. Explain gear ratio before sale.

name: High-Speed EX Counter Gear Set 3.7:1
description: 3.7:1 counter gear option for compatible single-shaft cars.

name: Mini 4WD PRO Gear Bearing Set
description: Ball bearings and gear shafts that reduce counter-gear friction in MA and MS cars.

name: Low-Friction Plastic Bearing Set
description: Affordable low-friction replacement bearings for beginners not ready for full ball bearings.

name: HG Round-Hole Ball Bearings 4pcs
description: Premium axle bearings for smoother wheel rotation and improved efficiency.

name: 60mm Reinforced Shafts Black 4pcs
description: Stronger 60mm axles for compatible chassis. Useful replacement stock item.

name: 72mm Reinforced Shafts Black 4pcs
description: Stronger 72mm axles for wide chassis and compatible front-motor setups.

name: Stainless Steel Screw Set 15/20/25/30mm
description: Common screw lengths for adding plates, rollers and dampers. A high-repeat-purchase item.

name: Stainless Steel Countersunk Screw Set 10/12/20/25/30mm
description: Countersunk hardware for cleaner plate mounting where the rules and plate design permit it.

name: Stainless Steel Countersunk Screw Set 6/8/15mm
description: Short countersunk screws for compact plate and brake installations.

name: Aluminum Spacer Set 12/6.7/6/3/1.5mm
description: Multiple spacer sizes for setting roller and stabilizer height.

name: Lightweight Plastic Spacer Set
description: Budget lightweight spacers for learning setup height before buying more aluminum hardware.

name: Mini 4WD Multipurpose Tape 10mm Blue
description: Useful for securing batteries and temporary setup work. Easy add-on sale.

name: Mini 4WD Car Catcher
description: Safer way to collect fast cars from the track. Recommended for every racer.

name: Mini 4WD Oil Applicator
description: Precision applicator for controlled lubrication without flooding the motor or bearings.

name: Mini 4WD F Grease
description: Low-friction grease for routine gear and drivetrain maintenance.

name: Mini 4WD Motor Case 2
description: Protects and organizes spare motors and small parts.

name: Magnum Saber
description: Existing club item pending a verified Philippine supplier cost — kept visible as PRICE PENDING rather than hidden.
